name: Level 4 Automation - Python & n8n
postStartCommand: docker container inspect n8n >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker run -d --name n8n --user root -p 5678:5678 -v n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n -e N8N_USER_FOLDER=/home/node --entrypoint /bin/sh n8nio/n8n -c "sed -i 's|.*Invalid origin.*|// patched|' /usr/local/lib/node_modules/n8n/dist/push/index.js && n8n" && docker start n8n
